Border - Class in javadraw
Utility class to manage borders, which at the moment create secondary objects around a primary object.
Border(Renderable) - Constructor for class javadraw.Border
Creates a new border around the given object
Border(Renderable, Color) - Constructor for class javadraw.Border
Creates a new border around the given object using the given color
Border(Renderable, Color, double) - Constructor for class javadraw.Border
Creates a new border around the given object with the given color and width
borderColor - Variable in class javadraw.Renderable
 
bottomLeft() - Method in class javadraw.Screen
Get the bottom left corner of the Screen
bottomRight() - Method in class javadraw.Screen
Get the bottom right corner of the Screen
